changes.summary: Added NotificationTypeSchema as z.enum with 47 literals mirroring api/.../notification.schema.ts union (lines 5–51) and exported NotificationType via z.infer.
Replaced empty stub with subpath re-exports of NotificationTypeSchema and NotificationType from ../notification.schema.

notes: Canonical Zod enum lives in notification.schema.ts; @meriter/shared-types/schemas/notifications subpath re-exports for Option B import path. NotificationRoutingSchema deferred to downstream Phase 1 unit.
